# MOLT Blocks - Idaho Grants Finder

- blueprint

## Block names currently extracted in the public-facing sleeve materials
### trigger
- `TRG.GRANT.001` - Federal Grant Search Required
- `TRG.GRANT.003` - USDA Rural Development Search

### directive
- `DIR.GRANT.001` - Execute Comprehensive Federal Grant Search
- `DIR.GRANT.003` - Identify USDA Opportunities for Rural Idaho

- `INST.USDA.001` - USDA Rural Development Search

### subject

- `SUBJ.USDA.001` - USDA Rural Development Programs

### philosophy

### blueprint
